response.overview: It contains: Captain Sisson leaving Ancón on his way to Paita; Atlético Chalaco; the Government Palace at night; views of the mountains; racehorses from the Alianza stud farm in Vilcahuara; cockfighting; a street in Lima on a workday; the Corpus Christi festival; the Corpus Christi procession is accompanied by President Leguía and the Ministers of State; the presentation of the marshal's baton to Andrés A. Cáceres by President Leguía and the review of the troops.
response.title: Revista semanal de Inca Film 6
